### `{r} sR$headings$presence_of_risk_and_protective_factors`

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeIntroductionTexts"}
```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_tbl-intro-risk-density.qmd")
```
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeMethodsTexts"}
```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_methods-risk-density.qmd")
```
:::

```{r}
#| output: asis
#| label: tbl-risk-density-rates
#| tbl-cap: !expr 'sR$`tbl-risk-density-rates`$`tbl-cap`'
#| tbl-cap-location: top

check_outlier_interpretation <- FALSE

# Conditionally render table only if department data exists
if (!is.null(benchmark_data$usage_density_rate_table) &&
    sum(benchmark_data$usage_density_rate_table$days_own, na.rm = TRUE) > 0) {

  # Check if reference data columns exist
  has_reference <- "pooled_ref" %in% names(benchmark_data$usage_density_rate_table)
  check_outlier_interpretation <- has_reference

  tbl_data <- benchmark_data$usage_density_rate_table
  cw <- compute_col_widths(tbl_data, stub_min = 18, has_reference = has_reference, n_w = 10)

  tbl <- tbl_data |>
    dplyr::select(-tidyselect::any_of("n_ref")) |>
    dplyr::rename(
        !!sR$table_headers$n := "days_own",
        !!sR$table_headers$rate := "rate_own",
        !!sR$table_headers$pooled := tidyselect::any_of("pooled_ref"),
        !!sR$table_headers$q1 := tidyselect::any_of("q1_ref"),
        !!sR$table_headers$q2 := tidyselect::any_of("q2_ref"),
        !!sR$table_headers$q3 := tidyselect::any_of("q3_ref")
      )

  ci_cols_to_drop <- character(0)
  if (!include_rate_ci)
    ci_cols_to_drop <- c(ci_cols_to_drop, "ci_lower_own", "ci_upper_own")
  if (!include_pooled_ci)
    ci_cols_to_drop <- c(ci_cols_to_drop, "ci_lower_ref", "ci_upper_ref")
  if (!include_quartile_ci)
    ci_cols_to_drop <- c(ci_cols_to_drop,
      "q1_ci_lower_ref", "q1_ci_upper_ref",
      "q2_ci_lower_ref", "q2_ci_upper_ref",
      "q3_ci_lower_ref", "q3_ci_upper_ref")
  if (length(ci_cols_to_drop) > 0)
    tbl <- tbl |> dplyr::select(-tidyselect::any_of(ci_cols_to_drop))

  tbl <- tbl |>
    dplyr::mutate(
    factor = dplyr::case_match(
      as.character(.data$factor),
      "cvc" ~ sR$cvc,
      "pvc" ~ sR$pvc,
      "vs" ~ sR$`tbl-risk-density-rates`$any,
      "inv" ~ sR$inv,
      "niv" ~ sR$niv,
      "human_milk" ~ sR$human_milk_sc,
      "probiotic" ~ sR$probiotics,
      "kangaroo_care" ~ sR$kangaroo_care_sc,
      "ab" ~ sR$`tbl-risk-density-rates`$any_antibiotic,
      "a" ~ sR$`tbl-risk-density-rates`$access,
      "w" ~ sR$`tbl-risk-density-rates`$watch,
      "r" ~ sR$`tbl-risk-density-rates`$reserve)) |>
    gt(rowname_col = "factor") |>
    sub_missing() |>
    gt::tab_options(
    latex.use_longtable = TRUE,
    table.width = pct(100),
    table.font.size = cw$font_size,
    footnotes.marks = "extended"
    ) |>
    fmt_number(
      columns = !(tidyselect::any_of(sR$table_headers$n) | tidyselect::matches("^factor$")),
      decimals = 1,
      sep_mark = sR$digit_group_separator,
      min_sep_threshold = 2,
      locale = locale_gt) |>
    fmt_integer(
      columns = sR$table_headers$n,
      sep_mark = sR$digit_group_separator,
      min_sep_threshold = 2) |>
    tab_row_group(
      label = sR$`tbl-risk-density-rates`$vascular_catheter,
      rows = tidyselect::any_of(c(
        sR$cvc,
        sR$pvc)),
      id = "grp_vc") |>
    tab_row_group(
      label = sR$`tbl-risk-density-rates`$ventilatory_support,
      rows = tidyselect::any_of(c(
        sR$`tbl-risk-density-rates`$any,
        sR$inv,
        sR$niv)),
      id = "grp_vs") |>
    tab_row_group(
      label = sR$other,
      rows = tidyselect::any_of(c(
        sR$human_milk_sc,
        sR$probiotics,
        sR$kangaroo_care_sc)),
      id = "grp_othr") |>
    tab_row_group(
      label = sR$antibiotics_sc,
      rows = tidyselect::any_of(c(
        sR$`tbl-risk-density-rates`$any_antibiotic,
        sR$`tbl-risk-density-rates`$access,
        sR$`tbl-risk-density-rates`$watch,
        sR$`tbl-risk-density-rates`$reserve)),
      id = "grp_ab") |>
    row_group_order(groups = c("grp_vc", "grp_vs", "grp_ab", "grp_othr")) |>
    tab_spanner(
    label = sR$`tbl-risk-density-rates`$exposure_density_rate,
    columns = tidyselect::any_of(
      c(
      sR$table_headers$rate,
      sR$table_headers$pooled,
      sR$table_headers$q1,
      sR$table_headers$q2,
      sR$table_headers$q3)),
    id = "exposure_density_rate"
    ) |>
    tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = list(
      cells_column_spanners(),
      cells_column_labels(),
      cells_row_groups()
    )
    ) |>
    tab_footnote(
    footnote = md(
      paste0(
        "$$\\text{",
        sR$`tbl-risk-density-rates`$exposure_density_rate,
        "} = \\frac{\\text{",
        sR$`tbl-risk-density-rates`$days_with_risk_factor,
        "}}{\\text{",
        sR$patient_days,
        "}} \\times ",
        format(100L),
        "$$"
        )),
    locations = cells_column_spanners(spanners = "exposure_density_rate")
    ) |>
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = sprintf(
        sR$`tbl-risk-density-rates`$n_footnote,
        sR$table_headers$n),
      locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$n)) |>
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = sprintf(
        sR$`tbl-risk-density-rates`$rate_footnote,
        sR$table_headers$rate),
      locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$rate)) |>
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = md(
        sprintf(
          sR$`tbl-risk-density-rates`$aware_footnote,
          "[aware.essentialmeds.org](https://aware.essentialmeds.org/)")),
      locations = gt::cells_stub(
        rows = tidyselect::any_of(c(
          sR$`tbl-risk-density-rates`$access,
          sR$`tbl-risk-density-rates`$watch,
          sR$`tbl-risk-density-rates`$reserve)))
    ) |>
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = sR$`tbl-risk-density-rates`$kmc_day_footnote,
      locations = gt::cells_stub(
        rows = tidyselect::any_of(sR$kangaroo_care_sc))
    )

  if (include_rate_ci && "ci_lower_own" %in% colnames(tbl$`_data`)) {
    tbl <- tbl |>
      gt::cols_merge(
        columns = c(sR$table_headers$rate, "ci_lower_own", "ci_upper_own"),
        pattern = "{1} ({2}\u2013{3})",
        rows = !is.na(tbl_data$rate_own)
      )
  }
  if (include_pooled_ci && "ci_lower_ref" %in% colnames(tbl$`_data`)) {
    tbl <- tbl |>
      gt::cols_merge(
        columns = c(sR$table_headers$pooled, "ci_lower_ref", "ci_upper_ref"),
        pattern = "{1} ({2}\u2013{3})",
        rows = !is.na(tbl_data$pooled_ref)
      )
  }
  if ("q1_ci_lower_ref" %in% colnames(tbl$`_data`)) {
    if (include_quartile_ci) {
      has_boot <- !is.na(tbl$`_data`[["q1_ci_lower_ref"]])
      if (auto_quartile_ci)
        has_boot <- has_boot & !is.na(tbl$`_data`[[sR$table_headers$q1]])
      tbl <- tbl |>
        gt::cols_merge(
          columns = c(sR$table_headers$q1, "q1_ci_lower_ref", "q1_ci_upper_ref"),
          pattern = "{1} ({2}\u2013{3})",
          rows = has_boot
        ) |>
        gt::cols_merge(
          columns = c(sR$table_headers$q2, "q2_ci_lower_ref", "q2_ci_upper_ref"),
          pattern = "{1} ({2}\u2013{3})",
          rows = has_boot
        ) |>
        gt::cols_merge(
          columns = c(sR$table_headers$q3, "q3_ci_lower_ref", "q3_ci_upper_ref"),
          pattern = "{1} ({2}\u2013{3})",
          rows = has_boot
        )
    } else {
      tbl <- tbl |> gt::cols_hide(columns = tidyselect::any_of(c(
        "q1_ci_lower_ref", "q1_ci_upper_ref",
        "q2_ci_lower_ref", "q2_ci_upper_ref",
        "q3_ci_lower_ref", "q3_ci_upper_ref")))
    }
  }

  if ("ref" %in% benchmark_data$dataset_names) {
    tbl <- tbl |>
    cols_width(
      stub() ~ pct(cw$stub),
      sR$table_headers$n ~ pct(cw$n),
      sR$table_headers$rate ~ pct(cw$rate),
      sR$table_headers$pooled ~ pct(cw$pooled),
      sR$table_headers$q1 ~ pct(cw$q),
      sR$table_headers$q2 ~ pct(cw$q),
      sR$table_headers$q3 ~ pct(cw$q)
    ) |>
    tab_spanner(
      label = sR$own_data_label,
      columns = tidyselect::any_of(c(sR$table_headers$n, sR$table_headers$rate)),
      id = "department_data"
    ) |>
    tab_spanner(
    label = sR$reference_data,
    columns = c(
      sR$table_headers$pooled,
      sR$table_headers$q1,
      sR$table_headers$q2,
      sR$table_headers$q3),
    id = "reference_data"
    ) |>
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = sprintf(
        sR$`tbl-risk-density-rates`$pooled_footnote,
        sR$table_headers$pooled),
      locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$pooled))
  } else {
    tbl <- tbl |>
    cols_width(
    stub() ~ pct(cw$stub),
    sR$table_headers$n ~ pct(cw$n),
    sR$table_headers$rate ~ pct(cw$rate)
    )
  }

  if (any(tbl_data$days_own < 10, na.rm = TRUE)) {
    sparse_note <- if (include_rate_ci) sR$sparse_data_footnote else sR$sparse_data_footnote_no_ci
    tbl <- tbl |>
      gt::tab_footnote(footnote = sparse_note)
  }

  tbl
} else {
  no_data_table()
}
```

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeOutlierInterpretation"}
```{r}
#| output: asis
  if (check_outlier_interpretation) {
    states <- metric_registry$usage_density_rate_table
  if (has_outliers(states)) {
    grouped <- group_outliers(states, "usage_density_rate_table", sR, metric_registry)
    outlier_text <- format_outlier_text(grouped, sR)
    if (nchar(outlier_text) > 0) {
      cat("\n\n::: {.callout-tip}\n")
      cat("## ", sR$outlier$heading, "\n\n")
      cat(outlier_text, "\n")
      cat(":::\n")
    }
  }
}
```
:::
